name: wf0b - 期初库存导入(精简查询+缓存补全)

parameters.query: WITH FilteredOITW AS ( SELECT ItemCode, WhsCode, OnHand, AvgPrice, IsCommited, OnOrder FROM OITW WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE OnHand > 0 ) SELECT T0.ItemCode AS item_code, T1.ItemName AS item_name, T1.FrgnName AS foreign_name, T5.ItmsGrpNam AS item_group, T1.InvntryUom AS uom, T0.WhsCode AS whs_code, T2.WhsName AS whs_name, ISNULL(T3.BinCode, 'Unknown') AS bin_code, ISNULL(T3.maxlevel, 0) AS bin_max_level, ISNULL(T4.OnHandQty, 0) AS bin_qty, T1.ManBtchNum AS batch_managed, T7.DistNumber AS batch_number, ISNULL(T6.OnHandQty, 0) AS batch_qty, CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T6.OnHandQty, 0) ELSE ISNULL(T4.OnHandQty, 0) END AS on_hand, ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice) AS avg_price, CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T6.OnHandQty, 0) ELSE ISNULL(T4.OnHandQty, 0) END * ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice) AS stock_value, T1.OnHand AS total_on_hand, T0.IsCommited AS committed_qty, T0.OnOrder AS ordered_qty, T2.BinActivat AS bin_enabled, T7.MnfSerial AS mfr_batch, T7.LotNumber AS lot_number, T7.MnfDate AS mfr_date, T7.ExpDate AS exp_date, T7.InDate AS in_date FROM FilteredOITW T0 INNER JOIN OITM T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode INNER JOIN OWHS T2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.WhsCode = T2.WhsCode AND T2.BinActivat = 'Y' INNER JOIN OITB T5 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T1.ItmsGrpCod = T5.ItmsGrpCod INNER JOIN OIBQ T4 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T4.ItemCode AND T0.WhsCode = T4.WhsCode AND T4.OnHandQty > 0 LEFT JOIN OBIN T3 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T4.BinAbs = T3.AbsEntry LEFT JOIN OBBQ T6 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T4.BinAbs = T6.BinAbs AND T4.ItemCode = T6.ItemCode AND T6.OnHandQty > 0 LEFT JOIN OBTN T7 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode AND T6.SnBMDAbs = T7.AbsEntry UNION ALL SELECT T0.ItemCode, T1.ItemName, T1.FrgnName, T5.ItmsGrpNam, T1.InvntryUom, T0.WhsCode, T2.WhsName, 'Default Bin', 0, T0.OnHand, T1.ManBtchNum, T7.DistNumber, ISNULL(T8.Quantity, 0), CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T8.Quantity, 0) ELSE T0.OnHand END, ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice), CASE WHEN T7.DistNumber IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(T8.Quantity, 0) ELSE T0.OnHand END * ISNULL(T0.AvgPrice, T1.AvgPrice), T1.OnHand, T0.IsCommited, T0.OnOrder, T2.BinActivat, T7.MnfSerial, T7.LotNumber, T7.MnfDate, T7.ExpDate, T7.InDate FROM FilteredOITW T0 INNER JOIN OITM T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode INNER JOIN OWHS T2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.WhsCode = T2.WhsCode AND T2.BinActivat = 'N' INNER JOIN OITB T5 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T1.ItmsGrpCod = T5.ItmsGrpCod LEFT JOIN OBTQ T8 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T8.ItemCode AND T0.WhsCode = T8.WhsCode AND T8.Quantity > 0 LEFT JOIN OBTN T7 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode AND T8.SysNumber = T7.SysNumber

UPDATE wms.wms_stock_snapshot s SET item_name = COALESCE(i.item_name, ''), uom = COALESCE(i.uom, '') FROM wms.wms_items_cache i WHERE s.item_code = i.item_code AND s.item_name = '' AND s.snapshot_date = CURRENT_DATE
UPDATE wms.wms_stock_snapshot s SET whs_name = COALESCE(w.whs_name, '') FROM wms.wms_locations_cache w WHERE s.whs_code = w.whs_code AND s.whs_name = '' AND s.snapshot_date = CURRENT_DATE

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: '期初库存: SAP无非零库存数据', count: 0 }) }}
